title: mosquitto storage vars
description: mosquitto storage vars that can be set

MOSQUITTO_VERSION.description: Specific version of mosquitto to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

MOSQUITTO_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install MOSQUITTO. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

MOSQUITTO_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for MOSQUITTO to listen on

MOSQUITTO_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for MOSQUITTO to listen on

MOSQUITTO_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for MOSQUITTO to listen on

LOGS_DIR.description: Directory where logs should be stored.

SERVE_FROM.description: Base directory or context path from which the service should be served.

LIBSCRIPT_VERSION.description: Specifies the version of the package to use.
